events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: lifts too thick for compactor. Pipe bedding & backfill rough-complete. Reference IPC 306 (International Plumbing Code? Section 306 Trenching and Bedding maybe). Project specs. Lifts too thick for compactor means backfill placed in lifts exceeding compactor capability/ spec max lift thickness, leading to inadequate compaction, potential pipe settlement, damage, non-compliance. Decision fail. Risk high? Pipe bedding/backfill inadequate compaction can cause settlement, utility damage, structural support. Commercial project, third-party inspections. Risk high. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says string. Use "" and 0.0. order empty list. workable empty list. findings: lifts exceed maximum allowable thickness for compactor/spec; inadequate compaction of pipe bedding/backfill; potential for settlement and pipe damage. actions: remove/rework over-thick lifts to specified lift thickness and recompact to required density; verify with proof rolling/tests; inspect bedding material and pipe support. rationale: IPC 306 and project specs require pipe bedding/backfill be placed in controlled lifts and compacted with suitable equipment; observed lifts too thick for compactor means compaction cannot achieve required density, creating non-compliant installed-defective condition. references: IPC 306, project specifications. Need ensure JSON valid.
